output.title: Output
output.description: Output generated from evaluating the answer

passed.title: Passed
passed.description: Whether the answer passed the rule check

rule.title: Rule
rule.description: ID of the rule that was applied

graded.title: Graded
graded.description: Whether the result has been graded

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to match against the answer

dotall.title: Dotall
dotall.description: Dot matches all characters including newlines

testcases.title: Testcases
testcases.description: List of test cases to run against the code

language.title: Language
language.description: Programming language of the code to be tested

show_evaluated_expected.title: Show Evaluated Expected
show_evaluated_expected.description: Whether to show the evaluated expected output in feedback

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of test case evaluation: 'ALL' requires all test cases to pass, 'ANY' requires at least one to pass, 'PARTIAL' gives credit for each test case passed.

prepend_code.title: Prepend Code
prepend_code.description: Code to prepend to the student's answer

append_code.title: Append Code
append_code.description: Code to append to the student's answer

indent.title: Indent
indent.description: Number of spaces to indent the student's code when embedding it

time_limit.title: Time Limit
time_limit.description: Time limit in seconds for code execution

expected.title: Expected
expected.description: Expected output for the test case

code.title: Code
code.description: Code to evaluate the answer. Required variables: 'output', 'passed'. Optional variable: 'feedback'.
code.default:
# 'answer' variable contains the student's answer (can be str, float, list, or set)
# You must set the following variables:
# 'output' (float): A number between 0 and 1; max_points multiplier (only used in OUTPUT mode)
# 'passed' (bool): Whether the answer passed (only used in PASS_FAIL mode)
# 'feedback' (str, optional): Feedback to provide to the student

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of evaluation: 'PASS_FAIL' uses a boolean 'passed' variable, 'OUTPUT' uses the 'output' variable (0-1) for scoring.

approximate.title: Approximate
approximate.description: Whether to allow approximate matches within a tolerance

tolerance.title: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Tolerance for approximate equality checks (if approximate is True)

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: List of rules to apply to each value in the multi-valued answer

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to match against the answer

testcases.description: List of test cases to run against the code

language.description: Programming language of the code to be tested

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of test case evaluation: 'ALL' requires all test cases to pass, 'ANY' requires at least one to pass, 'PARTIAL' gives credit for each test case passed.

code.title: Code
code.description: Code to evaluate the answer. Required variables: 'output', 'passed'. Optional variable: 'feedback'.
code.default:
# 'answer' variable contains the student's answer (can be str, float, list, or set)
# You must set the following variables:
# 'output' (float): A number between 0 and 1; max_points multiplier (only used in OUTPUT mode)

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of evaluation: 'PASS_FAIL' uses a boolean 'passed' variable, 'OUTPUT' uses the 'output' variable (0-1) for scoring.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: List of rules to apply to each value in the multi-valued answer

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of choice matching: 'ALL' requires all correct choices to be selected, 'ANY' requires at least one, 'PARTIAL' gives credit for each correct choice selected minus each incorrect choice selected.

keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of keywords that must be present in the answer

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of keyword matching: 'ALL' requires all keywords to be present, 'ANY' requires at least one.'PARTIAL' gives credit for each keyword present.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: List of rules to apply to the answer

aggregation.title: Aggregation
aggregation.description: Aggregation method to combine rule results: 'ALL', 'ANY', or 'PARTIAL'

mode.description: Mode of choice matching: 'ALL' requires all correct choices to be selected, 'ANY' requires at least one, 'PARTIAL' gives credit for each correct choice selected minus each incorrect choice selected.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Mode of keyword matching: 'ALL' requires all keywords to be present, 'ANY' requires at least one.'PARTIAL' gives credit for each keyword present.

if_rules.title: If Rules
if_rules.description: List of rules to evaluate the 'if' condition

if_aggregation.title: If Aggregation
if_aggregation.description: Aggregation mode for 'if' rules: 'AND' requires all to be true, 'OR' requires at least one to be true

then_rules.title: Then Rules
then_rules.description: List of rules to evaluate if 'if' condition is met

else_rules.title: Else Rules
else_rules.description: List of rules to evaluate if 'if' condition is not met

trim_whitespace.title: Trim Whitespace
trim_whitespace.description: Whether to trim leading and trailing whitespace from raw answers.

normalize_case.title: Normalize Case
normalize_case.description: Whether to normalize the case of raw answers.

value_types.title: Value Types

normalize_case.description: Whether to normalize the case of raw answers.

delimiter.title: Delimiter
delimiter.description: Delimiter for separating multiple-valued raw answers.

options.title: Options

allow_multiple.title: Allow Multiple

submission_count.title: Submission Count
submission_count.description: Raw submission count (None when no source data uploaded)

question_count.title: Question Count
question_count.description: Question count (None when no question set configured)

graded_count.title: Graded Count

coverage.description: Rubric coverage stats (None when rubric or question set is absent)
